note: Authoritative local data from L1 chains.db (DeFiLlama + CoinGecko + growthepie/Dune). Raw signals, no scores. null = NO DATA (do not guess). FRESHNESS: price & market caps are live (today); TVL/stablecoin LEVELS are the latest available (carried forward if a chain's today-point isn't in yet); daily-FLOW metrics (DEX volume, fees, active_addresses, tx_count) are the LAST COMPLETE UTC DAY (today is partial and excluded) — full-day figures, use them as-is. SHARES are each chain's % of the WHOLE DeFi market (all ~500 chains; denominators in market.total_*), so tracked chains sum to <100% and deltas are immune to which chains we track. TVL/volume are USD-denominated, so share moves in a big market swing partly reflect token price, not pure flows.

emerging_candidates.method: longshot-style L1/L2 momentum + DefiLlama TVL growth, radar excluded

narrative.method: CoinGecko category momentum (24h mcap change + constituent 7d breadth/median); thematic narratives only (chain-ecosystem/stablecoin categories excluded)

events.subject: FTSE Russell 1000 reconstitution (Bitmine/ETH)
events.note: ~$2.15B passive ETH buying; effective date. Watch ETH 5-7d before.

events.subject: Hyperliquid HYPE monthly unlock
events.note: ~2.5% of supply, monthly cadence on the 6th through 2027

catalysts.note: Curated dated catalysts (edit catalysts.json). DeFiLlama unlocks API is Pro-gated; the routine news-scan supplements. Fold these into the Open Items ledger.

attention.source: CoinGecko /search/trending (search/view velocity = retail attention proxy; LunarCrush free tier is locked/402)

pre_winner_lookalikes.method: validated winner-DNA coil screen (deep-below-high + oversold[validated] + below-ATH/high-vol/mid-float/small-cap); primed-but-not-yet-moved. NECESSARY-not-sufficient setup — needs an event trigger.

dev_governance.note: Pre-announcement layer (early, low-crowd): GitHub releases/commit-activity + Snapshot governance for tracked protocols. A fresh_release or a pending 'launch/fund X' proposal precedes the marketing post.
